apps.name: CloakNote
apps.subtitle: Encrypted notes with GitHub sync
apps.description: An encrypted macOS notes app that stores your notes in your own private GitHub repository.
apps.longDescription: CloakNote is an encrypted macOS notes app that syncs to your private GitHub repository. Notes are encrypted locally before upload, and your passphrase never leaves your Mac. CloakNote supports Turkish and English, auto-lock, themes, local draft protection, and background sync at configurable intervals. Your notes remain unreadable on GitHub without your passphrase.
features: Stores data in your own private GitHub repository
Local draft protection to reduce data loss
